texto: The writer is neither saint nor tzaddik nor prophet standing at the gate
autor: he's just another sinner who has a somewhat sharper awareness and uses slightly more precise language to describe the inconceivable reality of our world.
explicacao: Citação de he's just another sinner who has a somewhat sharper awareness and uses slightly more precise language to describe the inconceivable reality of our world. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The writer is neither saint nor tzaddik nor prophet standing at the gate” articula reflexao, etgar-keret, the-seven-good-years em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-seven-good-years.
